modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Subtract 0.2 V from `V(sigin)` before computing magnitude.
Use the absolute value of the offset-corrected voltage as the logarithm argument magnitude.
Floor the magnitude at 0.1 V before applying the logarithm.
Drive `sigout` to the natural logarithm of the guarded magnitude.

title: Logarithmic Amplifier
